name: Shaoxing Wine
descs:
[Effects apply only to #2 Deployed Identity]

Deal +1% damage for every 1% missing HP on self (max 10%)

[Effects apply only to #2 and #4 Deployed Identities]

Deal +1% damage for every 1% missing HP on self (max 10%)

[Effects apply only to #2 ,#4, and #6 Deployed Identities]

Deal +1% damage for every 1% missing HP on self (max 10%)
